DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS -- CAROLE S. CULLUM APPEARING FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY. RESPONDENT JUN TAKAHASHI APPEARING IN PRO PER. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $531.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. MODIFICATION: SANCTIONS STAYED UNTIL DATE OF COMPLIANCE, TO BE PERMANENT IF COMPLETE VARIFIED RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
